title: IT286R2 ARCHIVED - Trusts - Amount payable - Canada.ca

## IT286R2 ARCHIVED - Trusts - Amount payable

## We have archived this page and will not be updating it.
You can use it for research or reference.

## We have archived this page and will not be updating it.
You can use it for research or reference.
This bulletin deals with the meaning of ''an amount payable in a taxation year'' for purposes of the deduction in computing the income of a trust any income payableto a beneficiary.
